response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive full-stack experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, React, and testing frameworks (Vitest). His recent roles at re:cinq and Optilyz highlight relevant AI-agent infrastructure and enterprise automation tooling experience. While his backend stack includes DLang and Java (vs. Kotlin), his Node.js and TypeScript depth compensates. His open-source contributions and leadership in developer tooling further validate his technical expertise and problem-solving abilities.
strengths: Proven full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, and React in enterprise and AI-agent contexts
Strong testing culture with Vitest and Jest, plus CI/CD and DevOps experience (Docker, Kubernetes)
Demonstrated ability to design scalable systems (e.g., direct mail automation for millions of mails, GIS platform for NGOs)
concerns: Limited direct experience with Kotlin/Java for backend services (secondary stack requirement)
Primary backend language experience leans toward DLang/Java rather than Node.js/Nest.js for core backend work
Recent tenure at re:cinq (since April 2025) is very short; may not reflect current team fit or stability
